rationale: Both reviews block and surface the identical three scope problems (smoothness bundled into AffineAlgGroup, the vacuous ring-nilpotence IsUnipotent, and the True-stub Reductive/Semisimple classes built before prerequisite layers), all confirmable against the diff, with effectively the same fixes; acting on either yields the same improved PR. Review 1's extra GroupLike-pitfall note attaches to the same IsUnipotent finding both already flag for removal, so it produces no materially different outcome.
